mapper.select: SELECT VALUE_NAME FROM NIA.TB_LINKAGE_SEQ WHERE KEY_NAME = #{keyName}

insert.if:
INSERT INTO IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_ERROR ( INTERRIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRTYPE, STRLEVEL, STRTITLE, STRCONTENT, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, DATERAISEDATE, DATECLEARDATE, DATEREGDATE, STRCLEARCHECK, STRMEMO, STRACKNOWNCHECK, STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL ) VALUES
( #{item.intErrIdx}, #{item.moduleSrl}, #{item.strResID}, #{item.strIfID}, #{item.strType}, #{item.strLevel}, #{item.strTitle}, #{item.strContent}, #{item.strGroupID}, #{item.strGroupID1}, #{item.strGroupID2}, #{item.strGroupID3}, #{item.strGroupID4}, #{item.strGroupID5}, #{item.strGroupID6}, #{item.strGroupID7}, #{item.strGroupID8}, #{item.strGroupID9}, #{item.strGroupID10}, #{item.dateRaiseDate}, #{item.dateClearDate}, #{item.dateRegDate}, #{item.strClearCheck}, #{item.strMemo}, #{item.strAcknownCheck}, #{item.strAcknownCheckMemberSrl} )

mapper.update: UPDATE NIA.TB_LINKAGE_SEQ SET VALUE_NAME = #{value}, YD_DATE = now() WHERE KEY_NAME = #{key}
